mapper.select: SELECT TOP 1 PSM.PROP_NM_ACTY, PSM.ID_ACTY, PSM.LVL_PATH, PSM.PROP_CNTS_PPS, PSM.PROP_CNTS_MTHD, PSM.CNTS_OPUT_GIDE, PSM.PROP_MP_LINK, PSM.PROP_DP_LINK, PSM.YN_IADV_PRSS, PSM.YN_P6, PSM.PROP_DT_BEGN, PSM.PROP_DT_PLN_BEGN, PSM.PROP_DT_ACPT_BEGN, PSM.PROP_DT_END, PSM.PROP_DT_PLN_END, PSM.PROP_DT_ACPT_END, PSM.NM_CNTN_STATUS, PSM.PROP_STAT, PSM.NM_BIC_MA, PSM.NM_BIC_RN, PSM.NM_GK_TYPE, PSM.NM_GK_MA, PSM.PROP_YN_CPLT_USE, PSM.GIDE_TYPE_STD_LIST, PSM.GIDE_TYPE_EXC_LIST, PSM.YN_NEW, PSM.YN_NTFC, PSM.NM_NTFC_CYCL FROM OLM.DZK0.V_DZKDT_P_SITE_MNBODY2 PSM WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_Item ITM WITH (NOLOCK) on ITM.identifier = PSM.ID_ACTY + '_' + PSM.CD_SITE LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT PJT WITH (NOLOCK) on ITM.ProjectID = PJT.ProjectID and PJT.ProjectCode = PSM.CD_SITE WHERE ITM.itemID = #{s_itemID}

SELECT TOP 1 PSM.PROP_NM_ACTY, PSM.ID_ACTY, PSM.LVL_PATH, PSM.PROP_CNTS_PPS, PSM.PROP_CNTS_MTHD, PSM.CNTS_OPUT_GIDE, PSM.PROP_DR_STD, PSM.PROP_MP_LINK, PSM.PROP_DP_LINK, PSM.YN_IADV_PRSS, PSM.YN_P6, PSM.NM_BIC_MA, PSM.NM_BIC_RN, PSM.NM_GK_TYPE, PSM.NM_GK_MA, PSM.PROP_YN_CPLT_USE, PSM.GIDE_TYPE_STD_LIST, PSM.GIDE_TYPE_EXC_LIST, PSM.YN_NEW,PSM.YN_NTFC, PSM.NM_NTFC_CYCL, PSM.DISP_DR_BEGN, PSM.DISP_DR_END, PSM.NO_STD_MNAL FROM OLM.DZK0.V_DZKDT_P_STD_MNBODY2 PSM WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_Item ITM WITH (NOLOCK) on ITM.identifier = PSM.ID_ACTY LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT PJT WITH (NOLOCK) on ITM.ProjectID = PJT.ProjectID and PSM.CD_MNOF = PJT.ProjectCode WHERE ITM.itemID = #{s_itemID}

SELECT TOP 1 PSM.PROP_NM_ACTY, PSM.ID_ACTY, PSM.LVL_PATH, PSM.PROP_CNTS_PPS, PSM.PROP_CNTS_MTHD, PSM.CNTS_OPUT_GIDE, PSM.PROP_DR_STD, PSM.PROP_MP_LINK, PSM.PROP_DP_LINK, PSM.YN_IADV_PRSS, PSM.YN_P6, PSM.NM_BIC_MA, PSM.NM_BIC_RN, PSM.NM_GK_TYPE, PSM.NM_GK_MA, PSM.PROP_YN_CPLT_USE, PSM.GIDE_TYPE_STD_LIST, PSM.GIDE_TYPE_EXC_LIST, PSM.YN_NEW,PSM.YN_NTFC, PSM.NM_NTFC_CYCL, PSM.DISP_DR_BEGN, PSM.DISP_DR_END, PSM.NO_STD_MNAL FROM OLM.DZK0.V_DZKDT_P_STD_MNBODY2 PSM WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_Item ITM WITH (NOLOCK) on ITM.identifier = PSM.ID_ACTY + '_' + CAST(PSM.NO_STD_MNAL AS VARCHAR(10)) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT PJT WITH (NOLOCK) on ITM.ProjectID = PJT.ProjectID and PSM.CD_MNOF = PJT.ProjectCode WHERE ITM.itemID = #{s_itemID}
SELECT PJT.ProjectCode From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT PJT WITH (NOLOCK) on ITM.ProjectID = PJT.ProjectID where ITM.itemID =#{s_itemID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.TB_VISIT_LOG (ItemID,MenuID, ActionType, Comment, MemberID, Time) VALUES (#{itemID},#{BatName}, #{ActionType}, #{ExecDate}, #{RegUserID}, #{Time})
mapper.select: SELECT ItemID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ( (ClassCode = 'CL31000' AND Identifier = 'MASTD') OR (ClassCode = 'CL32000' AND Identifier = 'MCSTD') OR (ClassCode = 'CL31001' AND Identifier LIKE 'MPA\_%' ESCAPE '\') OR (ClassCode = 'CL32001' AND Identifier LIKE 'MPC\_%' ESCAPE '\') OR (ClassCode = 'CL33009' AND Identifier LIKE 'MPP\_%' ESCAPE '\') ) AND Deleted = 0
{ CALL XBOLTADM.DLENC_A_C_CD_SITE_TREE_BATCH(#{itemID}) }
{ CALL XBOLTADM.DLENC_ACP_TREE_BATCH(#{itemID}) }
{ CALL XBOLTADM.DLENC_ACP_ITEM_BATCH(#{itemID}) }
{ CALL XBOLTADM.DLENC_PLANT_MAP_TREE_BATCH(#{itemID}) }
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(ModelID),5000000) as maxModelID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE itemID = #{ItemID}
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR AS TARGET USING ( SELECT ITM.ItemID, ATR.ItemID AS AtrItemID, CASE WHEN PSM.ACTIVITY_POPUP_COLOR = '#FF0000' THEN 'DNP' WHEN PSM.ACTIVITY_POPUP_COLOR = '#FFFF00' THEN 'DP' WHEN PSM.ACTIVITY_POPUP_COLOR = '#808080' THEN 'DC' ELSE NULL END AS DoneStatus, ATR.LovCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR ATR WITH (NOLOCK) ON ATR.ItemID = ITM.ItemID AND ATR.AttrTypeCode = 'ZPAT030' AND ATR.LanguageID = 1042 LEFT OUTER JOIN OLM.DZK0.V_DZKDT_P_SITE_MNBODY2 PSM WITH (NOLOCK) ON ITM.Identifier = PSM.ID_ACTY WHERE ITM.ClassCode IN ('CL33005', 'CL33015') AND ITM.Identifier = #{identifier} AND PSM.CD_SITE=#{CD_SITE} ) AS SOURCE ON TARGET.ItemID = SOURCE.ItemID AND TARGET.AttrTypeCode = 'ZPAT030' AND TARGET.LanguageID = 1042
WHEN MATCHED AND SOURCE.DoneStatus IS NULL AND SOURCE.AtrItemID IS NOT NULL THEN DELETE
WHEN MATCHED AND SOURCE.DoneStatus IS NOT NULL AND SOURCE.AtrItemID IS NOT NULL THEN UPDATE SET TARGET.LovCode = SOURCE.DoneStatus
WHEN NOT MATCHED AND SOURCE.DoneStatus IS NOT NULL AND SOURCE.AtrItemID IS NULL THEN INSERT (ItemID, AttrTypeCode, LanguageID, LovCode) VALUES (SOURCE.ItemID, 'ZPAT030', 1042, SOURCE.DoneStatus);
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT TE.ModelID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE WITH (NOLOCK) on ITM.ItemID =TE.Link and ITM.Identifier = #{identifier} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM WITH (NOLOCK) ON TE.ModelID = TM.ModelID WHERE TM.MTCategory = 'BAS'
{ CALL XBOLTADM.HR_IF_STD }

SELECT TOP 1 PSM.NO_ACTY FROM OLM.DZK0.V_DZKDT_P_SITE_MNBODY2 PSM WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_Item ITM WITH (NOLOCK) on LEFT(ITM.identifier, CASE WHEN CHARINDEX('_', ITM.identifier) > 0 THEN CHARINDEX('_', ITM.identifier) - 1 ELSE LEN(ITM.identifier) END) = PSM.ID_ACTY LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT PJT WITH (NOLOCK) on ITM.ProjectID = PJT.ProjectID and PJT.ProjectCode = PSM.CD_SITE WHERE ITM.itemID = #{s_itemID}

SELECT TOP 1 PSM.NO_STD_ACTY FROM OLM.DZK0.V_DZKDT_P_STD_MNBODY2 PSM WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_Item WITH (NOLOCK) ITM on ITM.identifier = PSM.ID_ACTY LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT PJT WITH (NOLOCK) on ITM.ProjectID = PJT.ProjectID and PSM.CD_MNOF = PJT.ProjectCode WHERE ITM.itemID = #{s_itemID}
{ CALL XBOLTADM.ATO_CRTE_MDL_A }
{ CALL XBOLTADM.ATO_CRTE_MDL_C }
{ CALL XBOLTADM.ATO_CRTE_MDL_P }
{ CALL XBOLTADM.DELETE_MODEL_CHK_PREPOST }
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OLM.DZK0.DZKDT_PRSN_KPI_LOG (ID_USE_PRSN, TYP_KPI, CD_MNOF, CD_SITE, IP_IPUT_PRSN,DNT_IPUT) VALUES (#{ID_USE_PRSN},'05',#{CD_MNOF}, #{projectCode}, #{IpAddress}, GETDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT CD_MAP_VAXIS, MAP_VAXIS_COLOR FROM OLM.DZK0.V_DZKDT_P_MAP_VAXIS
SELECT ModelID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL WHERE IsModel = 2 and MTCategory = 'BAS' and ModelTypeCode != 'MT00033DRW' and deleted = 0

WITH ItemOCC(MyItem, MyItemType, MyClass, MyVersion, MyID, LastUpdated, MyCompany, TeamID, LastUser, Category, LinkType, SortNum, ProjectID) AS ( Select ITM.ItemID AS MyItem, ITM.ItemTypeCode As MyItemType, ITM.ClassCode AS MyClass , ITM.Version AS MyVersion, ITM.Identifier AS MyID, Convert(nvarchar(20),ITM.LastUpdated, 111) AS LastUpdated , ITM.CompanyID AS MyCompany, ITM.OwnerTeamID AS TeamID, ITM.AuthorID AS LastUser , ITM.CategoryCode AS Category, XBOLTADM.fn_GetPrePostFromElement(TM.ModelID, ITM.ItemID) AS LinkType , null AS SortNum , ITM.ProjectID From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WITH (NOLOCK) , (SELECT TOP 1 ModelID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ItemID = #{s_itemID} AND MTCategory = 'BAS') TM Where ItemID IN ( SELECT Distinct OBJ.ItemID AS MyItem FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM WITH (NOLOCK) , (SELECT TOP 1 * FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ItemID = #{s_itemID} AND MTCategory = 'BAS')MDL , XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT ELE WITH (NOLOCK) , XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM OBJ WITH (NOLOCK)
, XBOLTADM.TB_SYMTYPE_ALLOCATION TSA WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE ITM.ItemID = #{s_itemID} And ITM.ItemID = MDL.ItemID AND MDL.ModelID = ELE.ModelID And OBJ.ItemID = ELE.Link AND OBJ.Deleted != '1' AND OBJ.CategoryCode = 'OJ' AND MDL.MTCategory = 'BAS'
AND TSA.ModelTypeCode = MDL.ModelTypeCode AND TSA.SymTypeCode = ELE.SymTypeCode AND TSA.MdlIF = 'Y'
Union
Select TM2.ItemID From XBOLTADM.TB_MODEL TM2 WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ELEMENT TE WITH (NOLOCK) ON TE.Link = #{s_itemID} And TE.ModelID = TM2.ModelID
, XBOLTADM.TB_SYMTYPE_ALLOCATION TSA2 WITH (NOLOCK)
Where TM2.MTCategory = 'BAS'
AND TSA2.ModelTypeCode = TM2.ModelTypeCode AND TSA2.SymTypeCode = TE.SymTypeCode AND TSA2.MdlIF = 'Y'
) ), ItemMASTER(MyItem, MyItemType, MyClass, MyVersion, MyID, LastUpdated, MyCompany, TeamID, LastUser, GUBUN , LinkType, SortNum, ProjectID) AS ( SELECT Distinct ST1.ToItemID AS MyItem, ITM2.ItemTypeCode AS MyItemType, ITM2.ClassCode AS MyClass, ITM2.Version AS MyVersion , ITM2.Identifier AS MyID, Convert(nvarchar(20),ITM2.LastUpdated, 111) AS LastUpdated , ITM2.CompanyID AS MyCompany , ITM2.OwnerTeamID AS TeamID , ITM2.AuthorID AS LastUser , CASE WHEN ST1.CategoryCode = 'ST1' THEN 'M' WHEN ST1.CategoryCode = 'ST2' THEN 'R' ELSE 'O' END AS GUBUN ,ItemOCC.LinkType AS LinkType, ST1.SortNum ,ITM2.ProjectID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ST1 WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ITM2 WITH (NOLOCK) ON ITM2.CategoryCode != 'MOJ' AND ITM2.ItemID = ST1.ToItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN ItemOCC ON ItemOCC.MyItem = ST1.ToItemID WHERE ST1.FromItemID = #{s_itemID} AND ST1.CategoryCode in ('ST1' , 'ST2')
AND ST1.Deleted != '1'
And ST1.ToItemID !=0 AND ITM2.CategoryCode != 'TOJ'
UNION ALL
SELECT MyItem, MyItemType, MyClass, MyVersion, MyID, LastUpdated, MyCompany, TeamID, LastUser ,CASE WHEN Category = 'ST1' THEN 'M' WHEN Category = 'ST2' THEN 'R' ELSE 'O' END AS GUBUN ,ItemOCC.LinkType AS LinkType , ItemOCC.SortNum , ITemOCC.ProjectID FROM ItemOCC WHERE 1 = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'Z' FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM ST2 WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ST2.FromItemID = #{s_itemID} AND ST2.CategoryCode in ('ST1' , 'ST2') AND ST2.Deleted != '1' AND ST2.ToItemID = ItemOCC.MyItem ) ) SELECT DISTINCT MST.MyItem AS ItemID , MST.MyItem AS id , 'cxnProcess' AS parent , ISNULL(MST.MyID,'') + ' ' + ISNULL(TIA.PlainText,'') AS TreeName , 0 AS CHK , Row_Number()OVER(ORDER BY MST.GUBUN, MST.SortNum, MST.MyClass ASC, MST.MyID ASC, TIA.PlainText ASC ) as RNUM , CASE WHEN ISNULL(TIFF.DocumentID , '') != '' THEN 'icon_attach.png' ELSE 'blank.gif' END FileIcon , MST.MyClass As ClassCode , CASE WHEN MST.GUBUN = 'O' AND TIO.ItemTypeCode = (Select ItemTypeCode From XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WITH (NOLOCK) Where ItemID = #{s_itemID}) THEN 'ex_' + TIT.Icon ELSE ISNULL(TIT.Icon, 'img_job.png') END ItemTypeImg , MST.MyVersion AS Version , MST.MyID AS Identifier , MST.LastUpdated, MST.GUBUN , ISNULL(TIS.SCOUNT, 0) AS SCOUNT , TIA.PlainText AS ItemName , TD.Name AS ClassName , ISNULL(TT.Name, '') AS TeamName , TOT.TeamID AS OwnerTeamID , TOT.Name AS OwnerTeamName , ISNULL(TM.Name,'') + Case When ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') != '' Then '(' + ISNULL(TM.NameEN,'') + ')' Else '' End AS Name , TSD.Name AS StatusName ,CASE TIO.Status WHEN 'NEW1' THEN TSD.Name WHEN 'MOD1' THEN TSD.Name WHEN 'MOD2' THEN TSD.Name ELSE TSD.Name END AS ItemStatusText , TIO.Status , MST.LastUser AS AuthorID , TIO.Blocked , PJTXT.Name AS PjtName
, ISNULL(TIPT.Path,'') AS ItemPath
, ISNULL(TIS.FromItemID, '') AS FromItemID , MST.SortNum , CASE WHEN MST.GUBUN = 'O' THEN MST.LinkType ELSE NULL END AS LinkType , TIO.ItemTypeCode , TIT.ChangeMgt
, ISNULL(TIPT2.Path,'') AS ToItemPath
, TIO.Deleted , TIO.Version , TIT.AutoID , ISNULL(TIT.VarFilter,'') AS ClassVarFilter , ISNULL(TIT.Icon,'img_job.png') AS ItemClassImg FROM ItemMASTER MST LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT FromItemID, ISNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT ToItemID), 0) AS SCOUNT FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE Deleted != '1' AND CategoryCode IN ('ST1', 'ST2') GROUP BY FromItemID) TIS on TIS.FromItemID = MST.MyItem LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA WITH (NOLOCK) ON TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND MST.MyItem = TIA.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD WITH (NOLOCK) ON TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND MST.MyClass = TD.TypeCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM TIO WITH (NOLOCK) ON MST.MyITEM = TIO.ItemID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TSD WITH (NOLOCK) ON TSD.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND TIO.Status = TSD.TypeCode AND TSD.Category = 'ITMSTS' LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TT WITH (NOLOCK) ON TT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND MST.MyCompany = TT.TeamID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TOT WITH (NOLOCK) ON TOT.LanguageID = #{languageID} AND MST.TeamID = TOT.TeamID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM WITH (NOLOCK) ON MST.LastUser = TM.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_CLASS TIT WITH (NOLOCK) ON MST.MyClass = TIT.ItemClassCode LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT DocumentID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_FILE WITH (NOLOCK) Where DocCategory = 'ITM' AND Blocked != 1) TIFF ON TIO.ItemID = TIFF.DocumentID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT CSR WITH (NOLOCK) ON CSR.ProjectID = TIO.ProjectID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT PJT WITH (NOLOCK) ON PJT.ProjectID = CSR.RefPjtID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT_TXT PJTXT WITH (NOLOCK) ON PJTXT.ProjectID = CSR.RefPjtID and PJTXT.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_DIM TID WITH (NOLOCK) ON MST.MyItem = TID.ItemID
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_Item_Attr TIA2 WITH (NOLOCK) ON TIA2.ItemID = MST.MyItem And TIA2.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00036' And TIA2.LanguageID = #{languageID}
LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_PATH_TXT TIPT WITH (NOLOCK) ON TIPT.ItemID = MST.MyItem AND TIPT.LanguageID = #{languageID} LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TW_ITEM_PATH_TXT TIPT2 WITH (NOLOCK) ON TIPT2.ItemID = TIO.ItemID AND TIPT2.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE MST.MyItem != #{s_itemID} AND MST.ProjectID in ( SELECT ProjectID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL WITH (NOLOCK) where memberID = #{sessionUserId} )
AND REPLACE(TIA.PlainText, ' ','') like REPLACE(N'%'+#{searchValue}+'%', ' ','')
AND MST.MyID Like N'%'+#{searchValue}+'%'
AND MST.MyItem IN (${sessionParamSubItems})
AND MST.MyItem IN ('')
AND MST.GUBUN = 'O' AND MST.GUBUN != 'O' AND TID.DimTypeID = #{defDimTypeCode} AND TID.DimValueID = #{defDimValueID} AND TIA2.PlainText = #{srType}
ORDER BY MST.GUBUN, MST.SortNum, MST.MyClass ASC, TIA.PlainText ASC
ORDER BY MST.GUBUN, MST.SortNum, MST.MyClass ASC, MST.MyID ASC ,TIA.PlainText ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.TB_BATCH_JOB_LOG (ReportCode, Domain, Status, StartTime, Contents,Result) VALUES (#{ReportCode},'BPM', '01', GETDATE(),#{Contents} , 0)
mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(MAX(BatchJobNo),1) as BatchJobNo FROM XBOLTADM.TB_BATCH_JOB_LOG WITH (NOLOCK)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM XBOLTADM.TB_BATCH_JOB_LOG WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE StartTime >= CAST(GETDATE() AS date) AND StartTime < DATEADD(day, 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS date)) AND ReportCode = 'Acty' AND EndTime IS NULL
